macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: U.S. Stock Indexes Post Mixed Weekly Results
items.summary: The Dow Jones fell 1.3%, NASDAQ declined 0.9%, and S&P 500 slipped 0.4% for the week ended February 27, 2026, continuing a pattern of alternating gains and losses in early 2026.

items.title: Sector Rotation Continues: Energy and Materials Lead YTD Performance
items.summary: Energy, materials, and consumer staples have emerged as top-performing sectors year-to-date in 2026, while communication services and information technology—last year's leaders—are lagging.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Markets Brace for Clarity Act Decision on March 1
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market is focused on March 1, 2026, when the White House-set deadline for the Clarity Act could reshape legal frameworks for stablecoins and digital assets, potentially boosting institutional confidence. Bitcoin challenged $70,000 but is closing the week down 2% at around $65,500 amid Jane Street investigations and Terraform Labs lawsuits.[1][2]

items.title: Bitcoin Whales Accumulate Amid High FOMO and ETF Records
items.summary: Whales holding 10-10,000 BTC accumulated 15,411 BTC in the last three days, while small investors show excessive optimism; Bitcoin ETF volumes hit $23.1 billion record, but analysts warn of short-term risks until Clarity Act clarity.[1][2]

items.title: March Crypto Market Key Events: FOMC, Token Unlocks, Hong Kong Stablecoin Licenses
items.summary: Upcoming FOMC rate decision, Trump press conference, February CPI and non-farm payroll data, Clarity Act vote, Hong Kong's first stablecoin licenses, and major SUI/HYPE token unlocks could drive March volatility.[3]

items.title: Ripple CEO: 80% Chance Clarity Act Passes by April, Banks May Adopt XRP in 2026
items.summary: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse predicts 80% odds for Clarity Act passage by April, with White House targeting March 1 for stablecoin yield resolution, potentially leading to bank adoption of XRP.[4]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Lenovo Unveils Qira Cross-Device AI Agent and Hybrid AI Strategy at CES 2026
items.summary: Lenovo announced Qira, a personal ambient intelligence system that seamlessly transitions tasks across laptops, tablets, phones, and wearables, as part of its broader Hybrid AI strategy integrating devices, cloud, and enterprise AI. Highlights include AI-ready PCs, agent-native wearables, and a joint AI Cloud Gigafactory with Nvidia.

items.title: Nvidia, AMD, and Intel Showcase Next-Gen AI Chips and Platforms at CES 2026 Day 1
items.summary: Nvidia highlighted 'physical AI' for robotics and autonomous vehicles, while AMD and Intel revealed advanced AI chips targeting gaming, productivity, and embedded intelligence during CES's opening day.

items.title: Multiagent AI Framework Introduced for Offshore Production Surveillance
items.summary: A new agentic AI framework uses specialized AI models for collaborative tasks in offshore operations, including production monitoring, root-cause analysis, predictive maintenance, and optimization using comprehensive datasets.

items.title: Microsoft Announces Azure AI Connect Virtual Event for March 2-6, 2026
items.summary: Microsoft's 5-day virtual conference will dive into Azure AI services, including Cognitive Services, Machine Learning, and Generative AI, with workshops, expert insights, and networking for developers and enterprise leaders.

items.title: Rise of AI in Space: 20 Missions and Projects Highlight On-Board Autonomy
items.summary: AI is evolving into an on-board decision-maker for space exploration, powering autonomy in imaging, traffic control, and more across 20 key missions and projects.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Samsung Unveils Galaxy S26 Series and Expanded Ecosystem at MWC 2026
items.summary: Samsung showcased the Galaxy S26 series with Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset, redesigned vapor chamber, brightest camera yet, and industry-first Privacy Display. The exhibition highlights deeper integration across Galaxy phones and wearables for enhanced user experiences.

items.title: Samsung Announces Plan for AI-Driven Factories by 2030
items.summary: Samsung Electronics revealed a strategy to transform global manufacturing into autonomous 'AI-Driven Factories' using agentic AI for logistics, production, and quality control, with demonstrations at MWC 2026.

items.title: Huawei Launches Upgraded 5G-A Mobile Transport Solutions at MWC 2026
items.summary: Huawei introduced new 5G-A transport solutions emphasizing green ultra-broadband, suppression awareness, and network autonomy to support evolution toward 6G, reducing TCO by 30% and improving O&M efficiency by 20%.

items.title: ZTE to Debut Nubia M153 Smartphone with Doubao Assistant at MWC 2026
items.summary: ZTE plans to showcase the Nubia M153 at MWC 2026, featuring a preview of the Doubao AI assistant integrated into the device.
